hypothesis: If universal machine-learning interatomic potentials trained on diverse materials and paired with PBE-D3 dispersion are applied to MOFs without system-specific training, then they will reproduce PBE-D3 DFT reference structures, bulk moduli, and 300 K heat capacities and maintain stable 50 ps NpT dynamics at 300 K and 1 bar, because their learned interatomic interactions are transferable across metal–organic frameworks.
